content:
然后将自己彻底遗忘 - 
For this phrase, should it be something like "and then forgets them utterly"?
this is the Phantasmal Dive text if it helps

that does help! there was a bunch of discussion between Lens and I regarding translating the Dive & D-Effect lines from CN to EN, and while we didn't touch directly on that line I have confidence in Lens' decision on the EN phrasing to be close enough to the CN text to be worth translating from further.

TLDR, If you're using the document I posted in <#1416615133479960647>, you can take the corresponding EN line as an answer to your question.
got it! I'm translating into Indonesian and generally prefer using the EN lines as a guide but sometimes double check the CN just to be sure
yup, a lot of teams here are doing the same, that's why I made sure those few lines were well established in EN before uploading the file.
